2004.issue: [E2004] Version "0.2.10" listed at common.news at [io-package.json](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.voltoplus/blob/master/io-package.json) does not exist at [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.voltoplus). Please remove from news section.

3019.issue: [W3019] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5022.issue: [S5022] Consider adding explicit i18n attribute to jsonConfig.json(5)

5619.issue: [S5619] "admin/jsonConfig.json" does not specify the "i18n" attribute. It defaults to true, which may be unintentional. Please explicitly add "i18n": true, "i18n": false, or a custom path.

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("npm", "github-actions") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.4" at [package.json](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.voltoplus/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
